title: drosanthemum muirii
intro: Drosanthemum muirii, also known as the Bolus' daisy or Muir's daisy, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Drosanthemum muirii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and potentially aid in wound healing. Drosanthemum muirii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
